I

Image - Class in basicFiles.files.medias
Class representing an image file (e.g., .png, .jpg, .bmp).
Image(File, String, String) - Constructor for class basicFiles.files.medias.Image
Constructs an image file within a specific folder.
Image(String, String) - Constructor for class basicFiles.files.medias.Image
Constructs an image file in the current working directory.
Image(String, String, String) - Constructor for class basicFiles.files.medias.Image
Loads an image directly from the classpath (e.g., inside a JAR or project resources).
ImageFileFactory - Class in basicFiles.fileFactories
Factory class specialized in the creation and management of Image file instances.
ImageFileReader - Class in basicFiles.fileReaders
Reader class specialized in handling image files.
isEmpty() - Method in class basicFiles.files.BinaryFile
Checks if the file's internal data buffer is currently empty.
isEmpty() - Method in class basicFiles.files.TextFile
Checks if the line list is empty after ensuring data is up to date.
iterator() - Method in class basicFiles.files.TabularFile
 
iterator() - Method in class basicFiles.files.TextFile
Returns an iterator over the lines of the file.
iterator() - Method in class bigFiles.files.BigTabularFile
 
iterator() - Method in class bigFiles.files.BigTextFile
Returns an iterator that streams lines one by one from disk.
